SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY.title: Dream Key
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY.description: At the start of combat, [gold]Manifest[/gold] 1. Each combat, record the first Transparent Card in your deck that gains [gold]Release[/gold]. After recording the same name 3 times, 1 card in your deck with that name gains permanent [gold]Release[/gold].{ReleaseProgress}
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY.flavor: The key waits for the right dream.
SAKURAMOD-STORAGE_RIBBON.title: Sakura's Ribbon
SAKURAMOD-STORAGE_RIBBON.description: The first time each combat you [gold]Stabilize[/gold], gain {Energy:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SAKURAMOD-STORAGE_RIBBON.flavor: The ribbon she ties before setting out gently gathers magic before it fades.
SAKURAMOD-CATALOG_NEW_PAGE.title: Clear Card Album
SAKURAMOD-CATALOG_NEW_PAGE.description: Whenever a Transparent Card first enters your [gold]Catalog[/gold] or you play a [red]Temporary[/red] Transparent Card, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-CATALOG_NEW_PAGE.flavor: Each Clear Card is tucked carefully between the pages, waiting to be called again.
SAKURAMOD-YUE_MAGIC_CRYSTAL.title: Yue's Magic Crystal
SAKURAMOD-YUE_MAGIC_CRYSTAL.description: Every third Clear Card you play each combat grants 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-YUE_MAGIC_CRYSTAL.flavor: A pale crystal condensed from Yue's quiet moonlit magic.
SAKURAMOD-BAGUA_COMPASS.title: Bagua Compass
SAKURAMOD-BAGUA_COMPASS.description: Each turn, the first Clear Card you play randomly gains one Element: [gold]Wind[/gold], [gold]Water[/gold], [gold]Fire[/gold], or [gold]Earth[/gold].
SAKURAMOD-BAGUA_COMPASS.flavor: The compass turns, setting a direction for transparent magic.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_SEWING_KIT.title: Tomoyo Sewing Kit
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_SEWING_KIT.description: The first time each turn you play a Partner card, gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold] and make a [red]Temporary[/red] card in hand cost 0 this turn.
SAKURAMOD-TOMOYO_SEWING_KIT.flavor: Every stitch in a battle costume carries a little protection.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_JOURNAL.title: Dream Journal
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_JOURNAL.description: The first time each turn you play a [gold]Released[/gold] card, draw {Cards:diff()} card and [gold]Manifest[/gold] 1.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_JOURNAL.flavor: Tomorrow's dream writes back in a hand you almost recognize.
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_INTUITION.title: Dream Premonition
SAKURAMOD-SAKURA_INTUITION.flavor: A light she saw in a dream glimmers before she can name it.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_TRUE_FORM.title: Dream Key True Form
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_TRUE_FORM.descriptio: Replaces [gold]Dream Key[/gold]. At the start of combat, [gold]Manifest[/gold] 2.
SAKURAMOD-DREAM_KEY_TRUE_FORM.flavor: The key finally reveals its true form.
SAKURAMOD-KAITO_POCKET_WATCH.title: Kaito's Pocket Watch
SAKURAMOD-KAITO_POCKET_WATCH.flavor: The hands turn back, and the cost is set.
SAKURAMOD-AKIHO_ALICE_BOOK.title: Alice in Clockland
SAKURAMOD-AKIHO_ALICE_BOOK.description: The first Transparent Card you play each turn gains [gold]Release[/gold] this turn. At the start of combat, shuffle 3 [red]Dazed[/red] into your draw pile.
SAKURAMOD-AKIHO_ALICE_BOOK.flavor: When the story turns a page, dream and waking are drawn into the clockwork land.
SAKURAMOD-NAMELESS_BOOK_TRUTH.title: Nameless Book
SAKURAMOD-NAMELESS_BOOK_TRUTH.descriptio: [gold]Manifest[/gold] chooses from your deck instead of all 36 Clear Cards.
SAKURAMOD-NAMELESS_BOOK_TRUTH.flavor: The blank pages open past what Sakura has already named.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_SNACK_BOX.title: Kero's Snack Box
SAKURAMOD-KERO_SNACK_BOX.description: Gain {Relics:diff()} relics. Add 1 Kero Advice and 1 Kero Snack Break to your deck.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_SNACK_BOX.eventDescriptio: Gain {Relics:diff()} relics. Add Kero Advice and Kero Snack Break.
SAKURAMOD-KERO_SNACK_BOX.flavor: Kero packed snacks, surprises, and a little extra trouble.
SAKURAMOD-BROKEN_CLOCK_GEAR.title: Broken Clock Gear
SAKURAMOD-BROKEN_CLOCK_GEAR.description: Lose {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP. Transform 1 Gale and 1 Siege into Partner or Technique cards.
SAKURAMOD-BROKEN_CLOCK_GEAR.eventDescrip: Lose {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP. Transform 1 Gale and 1 Siege into Partner or Technique cards.
SAKURAMOD-BROKEN_CLOCK_GEAR.flavor: A cracked gear still turns change through the hands of time.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SEALED_BOOK_RELIC.desc: Clow and Sakura cards grant Magic Charge when played: 1 normally, 2 for Powers. At 10 charge, the next eligible card spends 10 charge for its Extra effect.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SEALED_BOOK_RELIC.flav: The Clow Cards wait in the sealed pages.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SEALED_WAND_RELIC.desc: When a non-secondary enemy dies, gain 3 charge. Gain 2 additional charge in Elite and Boss rooms, and 2 additional charge if Seal dealt the killing damage. At the start of your turn, spend 40 + 20 per converted Sakura card charge to add Turn to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SEALED_WAND_RELIC.flav: A key-shaped wand that gathers the light needed to turn Clow into Sakura.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SWORD_JADE_RELIC.title: Sword Jade
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SWORD_JADE_RELIC.descr: Release increases a card's non-damage, non-block numbers by 100% instead of 50%.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_SWORD_JADE_RELIC.flavo: A jade pendant that carries the Li family's sword spirit.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TEDDY_BEAR_RELIC.title: Teddy Bear
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TEDDY_BEAR_RELIC.descr: Whenever you play a Spell other than Empty Spell, gain 3 Block.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TEDDY_BEAR_RELIC.flavo: A handmade bear stitched with a wish to protect.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_ROLLER_SKATES_RELIC.de: At the start of your turn, if you have less than 3 Dexterity, gain 1 Dexterity.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_ROLLER_SKATES_RELIC.fl: They make every awkward dash look almost planned.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TOUYAS_BICYCLE_RELIC.d: Whenever you exhaust a Void, if you have Sealed Book, gain 1 Magic Charge.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TOUYAS_BICYCLE_RELIC.f: Touya's bike keeps arriving exactly when Sakura needs to move.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TAOIST_SUIT_RELIC.desc: Every fourth Clow or Sakura card you play adds an Empty Spell to your hand.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TAOIST_SUIT_RELIC.flav: Syaoran's battle clothes are cut for sharp steps and sharper spells.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_YUKITOS_BENTO_BOX_RELI: If you ended your last turn with 0 Energy, gain 1 Energy at the start of this turn.
Yukito packed enough for everyone, somehow.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_COMPASS_RELIC.title: Compass
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_COMPASS_RELIC.descript: At the start of combat, choose 1 of 3 random Clow cards to add to your hand and deck. It costs 0 this turn. Add 3 Void to your discard pile.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_COMPASS_RELIC.flavor: The needle points toward a card before Sakura knows its name.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TOMOYOS_HEART_RELIC.de: Every fourth card you exhaust, draw 1 card.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_TOMOYOS_HEART_RELIC.fl: Tomoyo's camera sees courage before Sakura can.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_CERBERUS_RELIC.title: Cerberus
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_CERBERUS_RELIC.descrip: At the start of combat, if you have Sealed Book, gain 6 Magic Charge. At the start of your turn, mark a random enemy. Marked enemies take 25% more attack damage until their turn starts.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_CERBERUS_RELIC.flavor: The guardian of the seal is small only when he wants snacks.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_YUE_RELIC.title: Yue
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_YUE_RELIC.description: For every third elemental Clow or Sakura card you play each turn, if you have Sealed Book, gain 1 Magic Charge. At the start of your turn, upgrade 1 random card in your hand.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_YUE_RELIC.flavor: Moonlight answers only to judgment earned.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_MOON_BELL_RELIC.title: Moon Bell
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_MOON_BELL_RELIC.descri: Whenever you play a card with base cost 2 or more, heal 1 HP. The first time you would die, heal 30% of your Max HP instead and add Turn to your hand and deck. Then this relic becomes used.
SAKURAMOD-CLASSIC_MOON_BELL_RELIC.flavor: A bell from the moon shrine that rings only at the edge of loss.
